query:
SELECT 
  d.id,
  d.matchType,
  d.confidence,
  d.status,
  d.createdAt,
  CONCAT(a.firstName, ' ', a.lastName) as contactA,
  a.email as emailA,
  CONCAT(b.firstName, ' ', b.lastName) as contactB,
  b.email as emailB
FROM duplicate_contact_pairs d
JOIN contacts a ON d.contactAId = a.id
JOIN contacts b ON d.contactBId = b.id
WHERE d.status = 'pending'
ORDER BY d.createdAt DESC;
